name: H.264 / AVC
description: Most compatible codec, good balance between quality and file size.

name: H.265 / HEVC
description: Higher quality than H.264 at the same bitrate, but slower to encode.

name: VP9 (WebM)
description: Open source codec by Google, excellent for web usage.

name: Apple ProRes
description: Professional intermediate codec, huge file size but extremely high quality for editing.
